highlights.description: PDF background image with text overlay, multi-page support, and per-segment styling
Security hardening: secure file operations (G703), secure cookie attributes (G124)

added.description: `pdf`: add `CreateBackgroundPDF()` and `CreateBackgroundPDFFile()` for PDFs with background image, logo, and text overlay
`pdf`: add `CreateMultiPagePDF()` and `CreateMultiPagePDFFile()` for multi-page PDF generation
`pdf`: add `TextBlock` type for per-segment style overrides (font, size, color, alignment)
`pdf`: add `TextAlign` type with `Left`, `Center`, `Right` alignment options
`pdf`: add `Page` struct for per-page configuration in multi-page PDFs
`pdf`: add logo overlay support with configurable position and scaling
`pdf`: add markdown parsing helpers for text segments

fixed.description: `md2pdf`: handle gofpdf HTMLBasic limitations (headers, lists, code blocks, unsupported tags)
`pdf`: add explicit `rotation:0` to watermark descriptors for consistent behavior
`pdf`: avoid deferred file handle accumulation in `CreateMultiPagePDFFile` loop

tests.description: `pdf`: add comprehensive tests for background PDF generation, logo overlay, markdown parsing

highlights.description: Markdown to PDF conversion with `md2pdf` package and example CLI

added.description: `text/markdown/md2pdf`: add `MarkdownToPDFBytes()`, `MarkdownToPDFFile()`, `HTMLToPDFBytes()`, `HTMLToPDFFile()`
`text/markdown/md2pdf/cmd/md2pdf`: add example CLI for markdown to PDF conversion
`text/markdown/md2html`: add `MarkdownToHTMLGoldmark()` using goldmark renderer
`pdf`: add `WriteFileMerged()` for merging multiple PDF files into one

highlights.description: Ristretto cache support, DynamoDB utilities moved to awsgo

added.description: `database/kvs/ristretto`: add Ristretto cache client implementation

highlights.description: Cobra command flag utilities for go-flags struct binding

added.description: `flag/cobrautil`: add go-flags struct bindings for Cobra commands

highlights.description: Structured logging utilities with ANSI color support

added.description: `log/slogutil`: add `log/slog` compatible functions with ANSI color output
`text/mustacheutil`: add mustache template helpers
`text/currencyutil`: add `Amount` type for currency amounts
`text/currencyutil`: add `Formatter` for currency formatting
`net`: transfer IMAP, mail, SFTP, and URL utilities from `gonet`
Transfer compression, encoding, logging, path, reflect, text, and time utilities from `mogo`

highlights.description: Initial release as `gostor` - Go storage utilities for DynamoDB, Redis, and file-based key-value stores

added.description: `database/document`: add DynamoDB, Redis, and file-based document store implementations
